message:
fix(consumer): prevent ack_floor stall on zero-start pending window

advance_ack_floor would permanently lock ack_floor at 0 if any pending
window had start=0 (saturating_sub(1) yields 0, min with candidate
always picks 0). Fix: filter out zero-start windows from the
min_pending_start computation since they cannot meaningfully bound
the acknowledgement floor.

Audit batch 475 final entries: consumer.rs (FIXED, 5106L),
stream.rs (SOUND, 2650L), browser_stream.rs (SOUND, 2970L),
wasm_abi.rs (SOUND, 6674L).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
